clinical_recommendation.dose_adjustment: Avoid clopidogrel. Use alternative antiplatelet agents (prasugrel, ticagrelor).
clinical_recommendation.cpic_guideline_reference: CPIC Guidelines for Clopidogrel and CYP2C19 - https://www.pharmgkb.org/documents/pa165990037

llm_generated_explanation.summary: This patient has a poor metabolizer (PM) phenotype for CYP2C19, indicated by the *2/*2 diplotype. They have severely reduced or absent CYP2C19 enzyme activity and cannot effectively activate clopidogrel.
llm_generated_explanation.mechanism: CYP2C19*2 creates a defective splice site that results in a non-functional enzyme. Poor metabolizers have minimal to no ability to convert clopidogrel to its active metabolite, leading to inadequate platelet inhibition and increased risk of cardiovascular events.
evidence: FDA Label: Clopidogrel (Plavix) - Boxed Warning for CYP2C19 poor metabolizers

quality_metrics.notes: Successfully parsed VCF. CYP2C19 *2/*2 diplotype inferred from homozygous alternate call at rs4244285.
